_provenance: REAL — match_nucleon(sigma) of the real run_eval.wls couplings in eval_output.json on the CORRECTED SM-like ZHMIX benchmark (Wolfram 14.3 + FormCalc 9.10 + LoopTools 2.16, 2026-06-28). sigma_SI(p)=1.18e-48, sigma_SI(n)=1.21e-48 cm^2. The 125 GeV h is SM-like (xi_V=xi_u=xi_d=1.0). The excess of sigma over the analytic EW triangle-anchor (central 6.4e-49) is the rigorously-computed triangle ITSELF (C_hchi=-7.57e-4 matches the anchor's analytic -5.41e-4 to ~40%, ratio ~1.40, inside its x3-5 band) plus the heavy-H CP-even contribution — NO box folded. The pseudoscalar-quark box is NOT folded into f_N: it routes through the suppressed gluon/twist-2 channel and is ZH-independent; folding it later is explicit provisional future work (<=1.7x upward if folded). 'sigma_provisional' kept true: a single benchmark point, box->nucleon matching deferred. See looptools-run-eval-fill-handoff.md.
